task_completion.description: Create a new dashboard and name it 'Network Bandwidth Monitor'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Graphite dashboard interface is visible with the dashboard title set to 'Network Bandwidth Monitor'.

task_completion.description: Create the first graph titled 'Inbound Traffic Rate' using the correct target metric
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Inbound Traffic Rate' is visible, and its data source/metric is set to 'servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in'.

task_completion.description: Apply rate, scale, and alias functions to the first graph's metric
task_completion.visual_evidence: The metric pipeline or legend for the first graph shows a rate function (e.g., perSecond or nonNegativeDerivative), a scale factor of 0.000008 (scale(0.000008)), and an alias of 'Inbound Mbps'. The graph legend should display 'Inbound Mbps'.

task_completion.description: Create the second graph titled 'Smoothed Traffic Rate'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second graph titled 'Smoothed Traffic Rate' is visible alongside the first graph in the dashboard.

task_completion.description: Apply the same metric pipeline to the second graph, plus a moving average window of 5
task_completion.visual_evidence: The metric pipeline for the second graph shows the same base metric, rate, scale, and alias functions as the first graph, but with an additional movingAverage(5) function applied to smooth the data.

integrity.description: The agent used the Graphite web interface to construct the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Graphite browser UI (e.g., Graph Composer, Dashboard UI), rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by writing the dashboard JSON directly in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) being used to write JSON files containing the dashboard configuration.

integrity.description: The graphs successfully render actual time-series data
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs display plotted lines indicating real data is being queried, rather than showing empty grids, 'No Data', or error messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Dashboard Name: 'Network Bandwidth Monitor'. Expected Graph Titles: 'Inbound Traffic Rate' and 'Smoothed Traffic Rate'. Target Metric: 'servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in'. First graph pipeline must include a rate function (e.g., perSecond or nonNegativeDerivative), scale(0.000008), and alias('Inbound Mbps'). Second graph pipeline must include the exact same functions plus movingAverage(5).
